evidence.q1: the limitation in Section 16 does not apply to claims under Section 13 or Section 14.
evidence.q2: Vendor may process Customer Data to provide and improve the services
evidence.q3: within 72 hours after discovering a Security Incident
evidence.q4: Vendor may use affiliates, infrastructure providers, implementation contractors, and other service partners to perform portions of the services
evidence.q5: Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 72 hours after discovering a Security Incident.
evidence.q6: Vendor will perform the services in a professional and workmanlike manner using personnel with appropriate skill and experience.
